SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MONIQUE FOURNIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAYLOR COLYAR IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
